summary: Route active runtime user messages through the registered Conversation Agent intent policy.
rationale: This slice registers the Conversation Agent prompt and routes active runtime messages into read-only questions, next-round requirements, or unsupported writes. It crosses prompt, Conversation Agent, and BFF route files because the prompt policy, model decision audit trail, and API surface are one user-facing control boundary.
deletion_targets: hardcoded Conversation Agent system prompt text inside service code
implicit write routing for active runtime user messages
unsupported runtime writes that are not recorded as audited intent decisions
line_count_rationale: The service module is pre-existing oversized conversation orchestration code; this slice adds a narrow runtime-intent route without broad service decomposition.
risks: Intent routing depends on structured model output; idempotency and failure records must remain durable.
Only next-round requirements may mutate runtime state while read-only questions use persisted runtime facts.
